## Summary

_One-sentence description of what this model should do._

## PRD Status

> No development work should begin until the PRD is approved.

- [ ] PRD drafted at `docs/prds/<model_name>.md`
- [ ] PRD reviewed by data team lead
- [ ] PRD approved — ready for implementation

**PRD file path:** `docs/prds/_____.md`

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — Blocking a launch or SLA
- [ ] P1 — Needed this sprint
- [ ] P2 — Next sprint
- [ ] P3 — Backlog
